## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy progress and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance showing positive trends: 90 more clicks, 1000 more impressions vs. last week](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [10 integration pages completed and uploaded as drafts; 2nd batch ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [New content topics proposed based on top-performing pages and WordPress trends](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Article refreshes showing significant improvements (e.g., 66% increase in clicks for one batch)](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Backlink strategy proposed as next phase to improve rankings for specific keywords](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Cumulative clicks and impressions over past 7 weeks showing upward trend](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Latest week: \~90 more clicks, 1000 more impressions than previous week](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Team requested breakdown of impressions by Google search result page position](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Action item: Provide detailed report on current pages' keyword rankings by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [First 10 integration pages completed and uploaded as drafts](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Second batch of integration pages written, pending factual review](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [4 more integration pages planned by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Maxime to review tomorrow morning and provide go/no-go decision](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Pages follow developer-driven structure with technical how-to sections](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)

### New Content Topics

  - [20 new topics proposed (rows 10-30 in assignments tab)](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Topics based on:](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
      - [Top 10 performing pages (e.g., e-commerce, Strapi plugins)](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
      - [WordPress trending topics, especially security-related](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [Best-performing Strapi content](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Topics complementary to integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

### Article Refreshes

  - [Multiple batches completed since Sept 21st](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Significant improvements observed:](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
      - [Batch from Sept 28: 66% increase in clicks/day, 8% increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
      - [Overall site during same period: 10% decrease](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [New batch of 10 refreshed articles to be launched tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Team discussing adding attribution for refreshed content in GrowthX campaign](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)

### Metadata Optimization

  - [Plan to optimize metadata (titles, descriptions) for high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [Goal: Improve click-through rates by better aligning with search intent](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)

### Knowledge Transfer Sessions

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Proposed as next phase to improve rankings for specific keywords](https://fathom.video/share/gpveyhLnaoKVbLcNGsTprZmbN6vigAov?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
